title: Detail full component catalog task breakdown
description: Make the component catalog backlog explicit by enumerating remaining modules from the guide, including Payments, GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket, Backend, Cache, MessageQueue, Authorization, OAuth, IaC, Monitoring, Logging, Search, Email, DataPipeline, ML, GraphDB, Plugin/Extension, Library/SDK, CLI, Monorepo, Microservice, LegacyMigration, Documentation, Testing, Security, and DevTools.
